data.name: About.CopyDiagnosticsName
data.value: Copy application diagnostics to the clipboard

data.name: About.Description
data.value: Accessible vehicle records for Windows and gradually more platforms.

data.name: About.HelpText
data.value: Information about Vehimap. Ctrl+O opens release notes, Ctrl+K opens the author support page, Ctrl+Shift+C copies diagnostic data and Escape closes the dialog.

data.name: About.Status.Basic
data.value: Basic application information is displayed. Diagnostic data can be shown or copied for support.

data.name: About.Status.DiagnosticsCopied
data.value: Diagnostic data were copied to the clipboard.

data.name: About.Status.DiagnosticsCopyFailed
data.value: Diagnostic data could not be copied: {0}

data.name: About.Status.DiagnosticsHidden
data.value: Diagnostic data is hidden. The standard view contains only basic information.

data.name: About.Status.DiagnosticsVisible
data.value: Diagnostic data is displayed. It can be copied for support.

data.name: About.ThankAuthorHelpText
data.value: Open the page where you can thank the author by supporting the work.

data.name: Confirmation.HelpText
data.value: Confirmation dialog. Focus is on the confirmation button; Escape cancels the action.

data.name: DataStoreHealth.CopyDiagnosticsName
data.value: Copy data set 2.0 diagnostics to the clipboard

data.name: DataStoreHealth.CopyFailedStatus
data.value: Data set diagnostics could not be copied: {0}

data.name: DataStoreHealth.CopySuccessStatus
data.value: Data set diagnostics were copied to the clipboard.

data.name: DataStoreHealth.HelpText
data.value: SQLite data set check result. Focus is on copying diagnostics; Ctrl+Shift+C copies diagnostics and Escape closes the dialog.

data.name: DataStoreHealth.InitialStatus
data.value: The data set check result is displayed. Ctrl+Shift+C copies diagnostics.

data.name: GlobalSearchWorkspace.KeyboardHelp
data.value: Enter or the button opens the matching vehicle or record directly.

data.name: GlobalSearchWorkspace.SearchHelp
data.value: Vehicle, license plate, document, reminder or maintenance

data.name: GlobalSearchWorkspace.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Vehicle, license plate, document, reminder, maintenance...

data.name: FuelWorkspace.DeleteHelp
data.value: Opens a confirmation and deletes the selected fuel entry if confirmed.

data.name: FuelWorkspace.ListName
data.value: Fuel entries for the selected vehicle

data.name: FuelWorkspace.OpenConsumptionSegmentName
data.value: Open fuel entry for the selected consumption segment

data.name: FuelWorkspace.OpenGroupSummary
data.value: Open last fuel entry in group

data.name: FuelWorkspace.OpenGroupSummaryName
data.value: Open the last fuel entry in the selected station and fuel group

data.name: FuelWorkspace.OpenWarningName
data.value: Open fuel entry related to the selected warning

data.name: FuelWorkspace.SearchHelp
data.value: Date, fuel, detail, station, volume, cost, odometer or note

data.name: FuelWorkspace.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Date, fuel, detail, station, volume, cost, odometer or note...

data.name: FuelWorkspace.Title
data.value: Fuel entries for the selected vehicle

data.name: FuelEditor.FuelDetailExample
data.value: For example Natural 95, V-Power or FuelSave

data.name: FuelEditor.FullTankName
data.value: Fuel entry is a full tank

data.name: FuelEditor.HelpText
data.value: Separate fuel entry editor. Ctrl+S saves, Escape or Cancel closes without saving.

data.name: FuelEditor.OdometerHelp
data.value: Enter odometer in {0}. Vehimap stores the value internally in kilometers.

data.name: FuelEditor.VolumeHelp
data.value: Enter fuel volume in {0}. Vehimap stores the value internally in liters.

data.name: HistoryEditor.HelpText
data.value: Separate history entry editor. Ctrl+S saves, Escape or Cancel closes without saving.

data.name: HistoryEditor.OdometerHelp
data.value: Enter odometer in {0}. Vehimap stores the value internally in kilometers.

data.name: HistoryWorkspace.DeleteHelp
data.value: Opens a confirmation and deletes the selected vehicle history entry if confirmed.

data.name: HistoryWorkspace.SearchHelp
data.value: Date, type, odometer, cost or note

data.name: HistoryWorkspace.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Date, type, odometer, cost or note...

data.name: HistoryWorkspace.Title
data.value: History entries for the selected vehicle

data.name: MaintenanceEditor.HelpText
data.value: Separate maintenance plan editor. Ctrl+S saves, Escape or Cancel closes without saving.

data.name: MaintenanceEditor.IntervalDistanceHelp
data.value: Enter distance interval in {0}. Vehimap stores the value internally in kilometers.

data.name: MaintenanceEditor.LastServiceOdometerHelp
data.value: Enter odometer in {0}. Vehimap stores the value internally in kilometers.

data.name: MaintenanceCompletion.AddHistoryName
data.value: Also write the maintenance item to event history

data.name: MaintenanceCompletion.CompletedOdometerHelp
data.value: Enter the odometer in {0}. Vehimap stores the value internally in kilometers.

data.name: MaintenanceCompletion.Description
data.value: Confirm the date and odometer from which the plan should be counted again. Optionally, the same item can be saved to event history.

data.name: MaintenanceCompletion.HelpText
data.value: Dialog for confirming a completed maintenance item. Ctrl+S saves, Escape closes without changes.

data.name: MaintenanceCompletion.Validation.CompletedDate
data.value: Completion date must be in DD.MM.YYYY format.

data.name: MaintenanceCompletion.Validation.CompletedOdometerNumber
data.value: Completion odometer must be a number in {0}.

data.name: MaintenanceCompletion.Validation.CompletedOdometerRequired
data.value: For a distance interval, also fill in the odometer when the item was completed.

data.name: MaintenanceCompletion.Validation.HistoryCost
data.value: History cost must be a number, for example 2500.

data.name: MaintenanceWorkspace.CompleteName
data.value: Mark selected maintenance task as done

data.name: MaintenanceWorkspace.DeleteHelp
data.value: Opens a confirmation and deletes the selected maintenance plan if confirmed.

data.name: MaintenanceWorkspace.ListName
data.value: Maintenance plan for the selected vehicle

data.name: MaintenanceWorkspace.SearchHelp
data.value: Task, interval, last service, status or note

data.name: MaintenanceWorkspace.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Task, interval, last service, status or note...

data.name: MaintenanceWorkspace.Status.NoMissingTemplates
data.value: Recommended templates no longer have any missing service plans.

data.name: MaintenanceWorkspace.Title
data.value: Maintenance plans for the selected vehicle

data.name: RecordEditor.ExternalPathHelp
data.value: Enter or choose an external path that will not be copied.

data.name: RecordEditor.HelpText
data.value: Standalone document and attachment editor. Ctrl+S saves, Escape or Cancel closes without saving.

data.name: RecordEditor.ManagedSourceHelp
data.value: The selected file will be copied to managed attachments when saved.

data.name: RecordWorkspace.CopyPathName
data.value: Copy resolved attachment path for the document

data.name: RecordWorkspace.DeleteHelp
data.value: Opens a confirmation and deletes the selected document from records; the related managed attachment remains handled by application safety rules.

data.name: RecordWorkspace.MoveToManagedName
data.value: Convert selected document to a managed copy

data.name: RecordWorkspace.SearchHelp
data.value: Type, title, provider, validity, attachment or note

data.name: RecordWorkspace.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Type, title, provider, validity, attachment or note...

data.name: RecordWorkspace.Title
data.value: Documents and attachments for the selected vehicle

data.name: ReminderEditor.HelpText
data.value: Standalone reminder editor. Ctrl+S saves, Escape or Cancel closes without saving.

data.name: ReminderWorkspace.AdvanceName
data.value: Advance selected repeating reminder to the next due date

data.name: ReminderWorkspace.DeleteHelp
data.value: Opens a confirmation and deletes the selected reminder if confirmed.

data.name: ReminderWorkspace.SearchHelp
data.value: Title, due date, status, repeat mode or note

data.name: ReminderWorkspace.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Title, due date, status, repeat mode or note...

data.name: MainMenu.File.BackupExportName
data.value: Export application data to a backup

data.name: MainMenu.File.BackupImportHelp
data.value: Selects a backup file and replaces the current data set after confirmation. A protective copy of current data is created before restore.

data.name: MainMenu.File.ExitName
data.value: Exit the application from the File menu

data.name: MainMenu.File.ExportCalendar
data.value: Export future due dates to calendar

data.name: MainMenu.File.ExportCalendarName
data.value: Export future due dates to calendar

data.name: MainMenu.Overview.CalendarExportName
data.value: Export due dates to calendar from the Overviews menu

data.name: MainMenu.Vehicle.CostsName
data.value: Open costs and summaries for selected vehicle

data.name: MainMenu.Vehicle.DeleteHelp
data.value: Opens a confirmation and deletes the selected vehicle including related records if confirmed.

data.name: MainMenu.Vehicle.ExportPackageName
data.value: Export selected vehicle to a package

data.name: OpenWorkspaceWindow.Audit
data.value: Open data audit in a separate window

data.name: OpenWorkspaceWindow.Cost
data.value: Open costs in a separate window

data.name: OpenWorkspaceWindow.Dashboard
data.value: Open dashboard in a separate window

data.name: OpenWorkspaceWindow.Detail
data.value: Open vehicle detail in a separate window

data.name: OpenWorkspaceWindow.Fuel
data.value: Open fuel records in a separate window

data.name: OpenWorkspaceWindow.GlobalSearch
data.value: Open global search in a separate window

data.name: OpenWorkspaceWindow.History
data.value: Open history in a separate window

data.name: OpenWorkspaceWindow.Maintenance
data.value: Open maintenance plan in a separate window

data.name: OpenWorkspaceWindow.Overdue
data.value: Open overdue due dates in a separate window

data.name: OpenWorkspaceWindow.Record
data.value: Open documents in a separate window

data.name: OpenWorkspaceWindow.Reminder
data.value: Open reminders in a separate window

data.name: OpenWorkspaceWindow.SmartAdvisor
data.value: Open smart advisor in a separate window

data.name: OpenWorkspaceWindow.Timeline
data.value: Open timeline in a separate window

data.name: OpenWorkspaceWindow.Upcoming
data.value: Open upcoming due dates in a separate window

data.name: WorkspaceWindow.AuditHelpText
data.value: Separate window for data audit and problem states. Escape closes the window.

data.name: WorkspaceWindow.CostHelpText
data.value: Separate window for costs across vehicles. Escape closes the window.

data.name: WorkspaceWindow.DashboardHelpText
data.value: Separate dashboard window across vehicles. Escape closes the window.

data.name: WorkspaceWindow.FuelHelpText
data.value: Separate window for working with fuel entries for the selected vehicle. Escape closes the window.

data.name: WorkspaceWindow.GlobalSearchHelpText
data.value: Separate window for searching across vehicles and records. Escape closes the window.

data.name: WorkspaceWindow.HistoryHelpText
data.value: Separate window for working with history of the selected vehicle. Escape closes the window.

data.name: WorkspaceWindow.MaintenanceHelpText
data.value: Separate window for working with maintenance plan of the selected vehicle. Escape closes the window.

data.name: WorkspaceWindow.OverdueHelpText
data.value: Separate window for overdue due dates across vehicles. Escape closes the window.

data.name: WorkspaceWindow.RecordsHelpText
data.value: Separate window for working with documents and attachments of the selected vehicle. Escape closes the window.

data.name: WorkspaceWindow.RemindersHelpText
data.value: Separate window for working with reminders of the selected vehicle. Escape closes the window.

data.name: WorkspaceWindow.SmartAdvisorHelpText
data.value: Separate smart advisor window. Escape closes the window.

data.name: WorkspaceWindow.TimelineHelpText
data.value: Separate window for the selected vehicle timeline. Escape closes the window.

data.name: WorkspaceWindow.UpcomingHelpText
data.value: Separate window for upcoming due dates across vehicles. Escape closes the window.

data.name: WorkspaceWindow.VehicleDetailHelpText
data.value: Separate window for selected vehicle detail and related records. Escape closes the window.

data.name: TrayActions.BackgroundStatus.NoNotification
data.value: Background mode is active. Nothing needs attention right now.

data.name: TrayActions.BackgroundStatusUnavailable
data.value: Background status is not available yet.

data.name: TrayActions.CloseName
data.value: Close tray actions without making a change

data.name: TrayActions.Description
data.value: Choose an action for the running Vehimap. This window replaces the native tray menu with a more accessible keyboard and screen-reader friendly control surface.

data.name: TrayActions.ExportBackupName
data.value: Export application data to a backup

data.name: TrayActions.ExportCalendarName
data.value: Export future due dates to a calendar

data.name: TrayActions.FeedbackIssueName
data.value: Open the feedback form for Vehimap

data.name: TrayActions.HelpText
data.value: Choose an action for the running Vehimap. The first button shows the main application window; the other buttons open overviews, nearest due dates, filtered checks or file actions. Escape closes the window without an action.

data.name: TrayActions.ImportBackupHelpText
data.value: Selects a backup file and, after confirmation, replaces the current data set. A protective copy of current data is created before restore.

data.name: TrayActions.ImportBackupName
data.value: Restore application data from a backup

data.name: TrayActions.OpenNearestGreenCardName
data.value: Open the nearest green card due date

data.name: TrayActions.ShowOverdueOverviewName
data.value: Open the overdue due dates overview

data.name: TrayActions.ShowUpcomingOverviewName
data.value: Open the upcoming due dates overview

data.name: TrayActions.ThankAuthorName
data.value: Open the page for thanking the author

data.name: Notification.HelpText
data.value: Short Vehimap notification. It closes automatically; when active, press Escape to close it.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Accessible.GroupSummary
data.value: {0}, {1}, {2}, liters {3}, costs {4}, average price per liter {5}, latest refuel {6}

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Accessible.Segment
data.value: Consumption segment {0}, distance {1}, refueled {2}, consumption {3}, price per liter {4}, cost per kilometer {5}

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Accessible.WarningWithAction
data.value: {0}: {1}. {2}. Enter or the button opens the related refuel entry.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Status.ManySegments
data.value: Consumption is calculated from {0} usable segments between full tanks.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Status.NoEntries
data.value: No refuel entries have been recorded yet.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Status.OneSegment
data.value: Consumption is calculated from 1 usable segment between full tanks.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Status.Unavailable
data.value: Consumption cannot be calculated yet. At least two full tanks with odometer values are required.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Summary.Main
data.value: Refuel entries: {0}. Total fuel: {1}. Total cost: {2}. Average price per liter: {3}.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Warning.ConsumptionHigh.Description
data.value: The segment ending {0} is significantly above this vehicle's average.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Warning.ConsumptionLow.Description
data.value: The segment ending {0} is significantly below this vehicle's average.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Warning.ConsumptionUnavailable.Description.FullTanks
data.value: Consumption cannot be calculated yet. At least two full tanks with date and odometer are required.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Warning.ConsumptionUnavailable.Description.InvalidSegments
data.value: Consumption cannot be calculated yet. Some segment is missing usable liters or has inconsistent odometer data.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Warning.CostInvalid.Description
data.value: Refuel entry from {0} has a non-numeric or negative total cost.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Warning.LitersInvalid.Description
data.value: Refuel entry from {0} has a non-numeric or zero fuel amount.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Warning.OdometerInvalid.Description
data.value: Refuel entry from {0} has a non-numeric or negative odometer value.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Warning.OdometerRegression.Description
data.value: Refuel entry from {0} has odometer {1} km, which is lower than the earlier value {2} km.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Warning.PriceHigh.Description
data.value: Refuel entry from {0} has a price per liter significantly above this vehicle's average.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Warning.PriceLow.Description
data.value: Refuel entry from {0} has a price per liter significantly below this vehicle's average.

data.name: FuelAnalysis.Warning.SegmentUnavailable.Description
data.value: Refuel entry from {0} has the same or lower odometer value than the previous full tank.

data.name: UpdateCheck.CopyDetailsName
data.value: Copy update check details to the clipboard

data.name: UpdateCheck.HelpText
data.value: Update check result. Focus is on the primary available action; Ctrl+Shift+C copies details and Escape closes the dialog.

data.name: UpdateCheck.ManualInstallFallback
data.value: Use the release page or download the asset manually.

data.name: UpdateCheck.Status.CopyFailed
data.value: Update check details could not be copied: {0}

data.name: UpdateCheck.Status.DetailsCopied
data.value: Update check details were copied to the clipboard.

data.name: UpdateCheck.Status.ReadyToCopy
data.value: Check details are ready to copy.

data.name: UpdateInstall.HelpText
data.value: The update is being downloaded and verified. Use Cancel to stop the download.

data.name: UpdateInstall.ProgressHelpText
data.value: Download and verification progress in percent.

data.name: Settings.AutomaticBackupKeepCountHelp
data.value: Available only when regular automatic backups are enabled. Enter how many automatic backups to keep.

data.name: Settings.AutomaticBackupStatusInitial
data.value: Edit supported options and confirm them with Save.

data.name: Settings.AutomaticBackupsHelp
data.value: When enabled, Vehimap creates automatic backups of the data set using the selected interval.

data.name: Settings.AutomaticBackupsIntervalHelp
data.value: Available only when regular automatic backups are enabled. Enter the number of days between automatic backups.

data.name: Settings.Description
data.value: Configure reminders, startup behavior, automatic backups, language and number formatting.

data.name: Settings.HelpText
data.value: Ctrl+S saves settings, Ctrl+B creates a backup now and Escape closes the dialog without saving.

data.name: Settings.HideOnLaunch
data.value: Automatically hide to tray on launch

data.name: Settings.LanguageRestartNotice
data.value: Changing the language is saved immediately, but the whole user interface will use it after restarting Vehimap.

data.name: Settings.MaintenanceReminderDistanceHelp
data.value: Enter the distance threshold in {0}. Vehimap stores the value internally in kilometers for compatibility.

data.name: Settings.RestartRequiredStatus
data.value: Settings were saved. The selected language will fully apply after restarting Vehimap.

data.name: Settings.ShowDashboardOnLaunch
data.value: Open Dashboard instead of Detail after launch

data.name: Settings.StartupNotice
data.value: If automatic hiding is enabled, Dashboard will not open at startup.

data.name: Settings.Validation.IntegerRange
data.value: {0} must be an integer between {1} and {2}.

data.name: Settings.Validation.NumberRange
data.value: {0} must be a number between {1} and {2}.

data.name: Settings.Validation.SeparatorsMustDiffer
data.value: The thousands separator and decimal separator must be different. Choose no thousands separator or a different symbol.

data.name: Shell.SettingsSaved
data.value: Settings were saved and overviews were recalculated.

data.name: Shell.Footer
data.value: Vehimap works with the same data as the original AHK version and offers vehicle detail, history, fuel, documents, reminders, maintenance, timeline, audit, costs, dashboard, smart advisor, global search and due date overviews. Editing opens in separate windows with accessible focus handling and Cancel return.

data.name: Shell.HelpText
data.value: Multiplatform Vehimap. After opening, focus is in the vehicle list on the left.

data.name: AuditWorkspace.KeyboardHelp
data.value: Ctrl+F searches, Ctrl+R refreshes the audit, Ctrl+P opens the problem item, Ctrl+O shows the vehicle, and Ctrl+U or F2 opens the nearest editor.

data.name: AuditWorkspace.KeyboardHelpName
data.value: Data audit help. Ctrl+F searches, Ctrl+R refreshes the audit, Ctrl+P opens the problem item, Ctrl+O shows the vehicle, and Ctrl+U or F2 opens the nearest editor.

data.name: AuditWorkspace.OpenVehicleName
data.value: Show the vehicle for the selected audit item

data.name: AuditWorkspace.SearchHelp
data.value: Vehicle, license plate, record type or problem description

data.name: AuditWorkspace.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Vehicle, license plate, record type or problem description...

data.name: CostWorkspace.ApplyPeriodName
data.value: Recalculate costs for the selected period

data.name: CostWorkspace.ExportFleetSummaryName
data.value: Export fleet cost summary to TSV

data.name: CostWorkspace.ExportSelectedDetailName
data.value: Export selected vehicle cost detail to TSV

data.name: CostWorkspace.ExportSelectedReportName
data.value: Export selected vehicle cost HTML report

data.name: CostWorkspace.FocusDetailName
data.value: Show cost breakdown for the selected vehicle

data.name: CostWorkspace.OpenVehicleName
data.value: Show vehicle detail from cost overview

data.name: CostWorkspace.PeriodEndHelp
data.value: End date of the cost period, for example 2026-12-31 or 31.12.2026

data.name: CostWorkspace.PeriodStartHelp
data.value: Start date of the cost period, for example 2026-01-01 or 01.01.2026

data.name: CostWorkspace.SearchHelp
data.value: Vehicle, category, amount, cost per distance or calculation status

data.name: CostWorkspace.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Vehicle, category, amount, cost per distance or calculation status...

data.name: DashboardWorkspace.AuditOpenName
data.value: Open vehicle or record from the selected audit item

data.name: DashboardWorkspace.CompleteMaintenanceName
data.value: Mark selected dashboard service due date as completed

data.name: DashboardWorkspace.CostOpenName
data.value: Select vehicle from the cost overview

data.name: DashboardWorkspace.EditVehicleName
data.value: Edit the vehicle selected on the dashboard

data.name: DashboardWorkspace.KeyboardHelp
data.value: Ctrl+R refreshes the dashboard, Ctrl+F opens global search, Ctrl+T opens upcoming due dates, Ctrl+Shift+T opens overdue due dates, Ctrl+P opens the selected due date, Ctrl+H opens vehicle history, Ctrl+L completes the selected service, Ctrl+O shows the vehicle, and Ctrl+U or F2 edits the vehicle.

data.name: DashboardWorkspace.KeyboardHelpName
data.value: Dashboard keyboard help. Ctrl+R refreshes the dashboard, Ctrl+F opens global search, Ctrl+T opens upcoming due dates, Ctrl+Shift+T opens overdue due dates, Ctrl+P opens the selected due date, Ctrl+H opens vehicle history, Ctrl+L completes the selected service, Ctrl+O shows the vehicle, and Ctrl+U or F2 edits the vehicle.

data.name: DashboardWorkspace.OpenVehicleName
data.value: Show vehicle selected on the dashboard

data.name: DashboardWorkspace.OverdueName
data.value: Open overdue due dates from dashboard

data.name: DashboardWorkspace.ShowOnLaunchHelp
data.value: Writes the same application setting as the Settings dialog.

data.name: DashboardWorkspace.ShowOnLaunchName
data.value: Show dashboard when the application starts

data.name: DashboardWorkspace.TimelineOpenName
data.value: Open selected due date from dashboard

data.name: DashboardWorkspace.UpcomingName
data.value: Open upcoming due dates from dashboard

data.name: DashboardWorkspace.VehicleCostsName
data.value: Open costs for the vehicle selected on the dashboard

data.name: DashboardWorkspace.VehicleHistoryName
data.value: Open history for the vehicle selected on the dashboard

data.name: SmartAdvisorWorkspace.KeyboardHelp
data.value: Ctrl+F searches, Ctrl+R refreshes the advisor, and Enter or Ctrl+O opens the selected recommendation.

data.name: SmartAdvisorWorkspace.KeyboardHelpName
data.value: Smart advisor help. Ctrl+F searches, Ctrl+R refreshes the advisor, and Enter or Ctrl+O opens the selected recommendation.

data.name: SmartAdvisorWorkspace.OpenVehicleName
data.value: Show the vehicle for the selected recommendation

data.name: SmartAdvisorWorkspace.SearchHelp
data.value: Vehicle, priority, category or recommendation text

data.name: SmartAdvisorWorkspace.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Vehicle, priority, category or recommendation text...

data.name: TimelineWorkspace.KeyboardHelp
data.value: Enter or the button opens the related record tab.

data.name: UpcomingOverviewWorkspace.Help
data.value: The due date overview shows upcoming technical inspections, green cards, reminders, documents and maintenance tasks with dates.

data.name: UpcomingOverviewWorkspace.IncludeDataIssuesName
data.value: Also show audit data issues in the due date overview

data.name: UpcomingOverviewWorkspace.IncludeMissingGreenCards
data.value: Show vehicles without green card too

data.name: UpcomingOverviewWorkspace.IncludeMissingGreenCardsName
data.value: Also show vehicles without a filled green card in the due date overview

data.name: UpcomingOverviewWorkspace.OpenEvidenceName
data.value: Open the record for the selected upcoming due date

data.name: UpcomingOverviewWorkspace.OpenVehicleName
data.value: Show the vehicle for the selected upcoming due date

data.name: UpcomingOverviewWorkspace.SearchHelp
data.value: Vehicle, license plate, due date or item

data.name: UpcomingOverviewWorkspace.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Vehicle, license plate, due date or item...

data.name: OverdueOverviewWorkspace.Help
data.value: Overdue due dates help you quickly review records that are already past their deadline and need attention.

data.name: OverdueOverviewWorkspace.OpenEvidenceName
data.value: Open the record for the selected overdue due date

data.name: OverdueOverviewWorkspace.OpenVehicleName
data.value: Show the vehicle for the selected overdue due date

data.name: OverdueOverviewWorkspace.SearchHelp
data.value: Vehicle, license plate, due date or item

data.name: OverdueOverviewWorkspace.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Vehicle, license plate, due date or item...

data.name: VehicleList.ListHelp
data.value: Use arrow keys to select a vehicle. Detail and related records are shown on the right.

data.name: VehicleList.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Name, make, license plate, note or tag

data.name: VehicleDetail.DeleteVehicleHelp
data.value: Opens a confirmation and deletes the selected vehicle including its related records if confirmed.

data.name: VehicleDetail.EvidenceSummaryListName
data.value: Related record status for the selected vehicle

data.name: VehicleDetail.OpenCostsName
data.value: Open costs for the selected vehicle

data.name: VehicleDetail.OpenFuelName
data.value: Open fuel entries for the selected vehicle

data.name: VehicleDetail.OpenHistoryName
data.value: Open history for the selected vehicle

data.name: VehicleDetail.OpenMaintenanceName
data.value: Open maintenance plan for the selected vehicle

data.name: VehicleDetail.OpenRecordsName
data.value: Open documents and attachments for the selected vehicle

data.name: VehicleDetail.OpenRemindersName
data.value: Open reminders for the selected vehicle

data.name: VehicleDetail.OpenServiceBookName
data.value: Open service book for the selected vehicle

data.name: VehicleDetail.OpenTimelineName
data.value: Open timeline for the selected vehicle

data.name: VehicleDetail.RecentHistoryListName
data.value: Recent historical events for the selected vehicle

data.name: VehicleDetail.RelatedActionsHelp
data.value: Go directly to the selected vehicle records, timeline or costs.

data.name: VehicleDetail.RelatedActionsPanelName
data.value: Related records for the selected vehicle

data.name: VehicleDetail.StarterBundleName
data.value: Open bundle for the selected vehicle

data.name: VehicleDetail.Status.BundleNoMissingItems
data.value: The vehicle bundle has no missing items.

data.name: VehicleDetail.Status.NewVehicleBundleNoItems
data.value: New vehicle was saved. The vehicle bundle had no new items.

data.name: WorkspaceTabs.ContentHelp
data.value: Content changes based on the selected tab above.

data.name: WorkspaceTabs.Heading
data.value: Main workspace tabs for the selected vehicle

data.name: WorkspaceTabs.Help
data.value: Tab moves to the currently selected tab. Left and right arrows change the selected tab.

data.name: VehicleEditor.HelpText
data.value: Standalone vehicle editor. Ctrl+S saves, Escape or Cancel closes without saving.

data.name: VehicleEditor.Warning
data.value: Changing the vehicle keeps related history, fuel records, documents, reminders and maintenance.
